title: Cobblemon Captain Pikachu (under 1.7)
description: Captain Pikachu joins Cobblemon for more epic battles and adventures!
body:
**Captain Pikachu in Cobblemon**

**_(Obtained using a breeze rod on a pikachu!)_**

Since **captain pikachu** will be added in **1.7** I really wanted to play it, but **1.7** may or may not be the **biggest update** what means it takes allot of time so thats why I created the **Captain Pikachu** cobblemon addon!
**![Captain Pikachu!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6a9fbd3e9f64e33e424d0112d4d75200ff85eb80.png)**

**_(MODEL NOT CREATED BY ME!)_**

_If you want early acces to it download this addon!_

**How to obtain captain pikachu?**
It doesn't matter if you have a **male or female pikachu** the only thing that matters is that you need a **breeze rod**, **right click** the **breeze rod** on a **pikachu** and then it's **ready to evolve**!

**How to download?**
**Download the pack** then **put it into your resource pack folder** and you **world data pack folder**.
